query: How do I set up auto-punch for my team?
contexts: Auto-punch allows employees to automatically clock in/out based on configured work hours. To set up: 1) Go to Settings > Auto-punch 2) Select team 3) Set work hours 4) Enable automation
generated_answer: To set up auto-punch for your team, go to Settings > Auto-punch, select your team, configure work hours, and enable automation. Employees will then be automatically punched in/out based on these settings.

query: What are the pricing plans?
contexts: We offer three plans: Basic ($5/user/month), Pro ($10/user/month), and Enterprise (custom pricing). Each plan includes different features like integrations, API access, and support levels.
generated_answer: We offer Basic at $5/user/month, Pro at $10/user/month, and Enterprise with custom pricing. Pro includes API access and priority support.

query: How do I export timesheet data to Excel?
contexts: You can export timesheet data from the Reports section. Navigate to Reports > Timesheets, select your date range, and click Export. Supported formats include CSV and Excel.
generated_answer: Go to Reports > Timesheets, select your date range, and click Export. You can download as CSV or Excel format.

query: Can I integrate with Slack?
contexts: Yes, we offer Slack integration. Install from the Slack App Directory, authorize permissions, and configure which channels to post updates to.
generated_answer: Yes! Install our app from the Slack App Directory, authorize permissions, and configure channels for updates.

query: How do I add a new employee?
contexts: To add employees: 1) Go to Team > Members 2) Click 'Add Member' 3) Enter email and role 4) Send invitation. They'll receive an email to join.
generated_answer: Go to Team > Members, click 'Add Member', enter their email and role, then send the invitation. They'll get an email to join.

query: What's the difference between vacation and sick leave?
contexts: Vacation leave is planned time off for rest/personal matters. Sick leave is for health issues. Both can be configured with different accrual rates and approval requirements.
generated_answer: Vacation is planned time off, sick leave is for health issues. They have separate accrual rates and may have different approval requirements.

query: How do I cancel my subscription?
contexts: You can deactivate your account from Settings > Account > Deactivate. This will stop billing at the end of your current period.
generated_answer: Go to Settings > Account > Deactivate to stop your subscription. Billing stops at the end of your current period.

query: How do I set up manager approvals?
contexts: Manager approvals can be configured in Settings > Approvals. You can set up approval chains, define who can approve what types of requests, and configure escalation rules.
generated_answer: Configure approvals in Settings > Approvals. Set up approval chains, define approver roles, and configure escalation rules.

query: Can I restrict clock-in by IP address?
contexts: IP restrictions are available on Pro and Enterprise plans. Go to Security > IP Restrictions to configure allowed IP ranges.
generated_answer: Yes, on Pro and Enterprise plans. Go to Security > IP Restrictions to set allowed IP ranges.

query: How do I generate a monthly attendance report?
contexts: Monthly reports are available in Reports > Monthly Summary. Select the month, choose which employees to include, and export.
generated_answer: Go to Reports > Monthly Summary, select the month and employees, then export.

query: My team's sick leave balances are showing incorrectly. Two employees show 0 days but they should have 5 each.
contexts: Sick leave accrues monthly based on your policy settings. Check Settings > Leave Policies to verify accrual rates and eligibility rules.
generated_answer: Sick leave accrues monthly based on your policy. Check Settings > Leave Policies to verify rates and eligibility.

query: The timesheet export is not working. I click export and nothing happens.
contexts: Export functionality requires a stable internet connection. Large date ranges may take time to process. Try refreshing the page or selecting a smaller date range.
generated_answer: Ensure you have a stable connection. Large ranges take time. Try refreshing or selecting a smaller date range.

query: I approved a vacation request but it's still showing as pending for the employee.
contexts: After approval, it may take a few minutes for the status to sync across all views. Ask the employee to refresh their dashboard.
generated_answer: Approval status may take a few minutes to sync. Ask the employee to refresh their dashboard.

query: Why is my overtime not being calculated correctly? I worked 45 hours but it shows 40.
contexts: Overtime is calculated based on your configured work week hours. Check Settings > Overtime Rules to verify thresholds and calculation methods.
generated_answer: Overtime depends on configured work week hours. Check Settings > Overtime Rules to verify your thresholds.

query: Employees can't see the 'Request Leave' button. Is this a permission issue?
contexts: The leave request button visibility depends on role permissions. Admins can configure which roles see which features in Settings > Permissions.
generated_answer: Button visibility depends on role permissions. Configure in Settings > Permissions which roles can access leave requests.

query: I need to change my billing from monthly to annual. How do I do that?
contexts: Billing cycle changes can be made from Settings > Billing. Changes take effect at the start of your next billing period.
generated_answer: Go to Settings > Billing to change your cycle. Changes take effect next billing period.

query: How do I set up different work hours for different teams?
contexts: Work hours can be configured per team. Go to Team Settings > Work Hours for each team you manage.
generated_answer: Configure work hours per team in Team Settings > Work Hours for each team.

query: Can employees clock in from their phones?
contexts: Yes, we have mobile apps for iOS and Android. Employees can download from app stores and log in with their credentials.
generated_answer: Yes! Download our iOS or Android app. Employees log in with their credentials.

query: How do I enable email notifications for managers when employees request leave?
contexts: Notifications can be configured in Settings > Notifications. Enable email alerts for leave requests and select which managers receive them.
generated_answer: Enable in Settings > Notifications. Turn on email alerts for leave requests and select recipient managers.

query: What happens to data when an employee leaves the company?
contexts: When an employee is deactivated, their timesheet data is retained for compliance but they can no longer access the system. Admins can export data before deactivation.
generated_answer: Deactivated employee data is retained for compliance but they lose access. Admins can export data before deactivation.

query: How do I bulk import employees from CSV?
contexts: Bulk import is available on Pro and Enterprise plans. Go to Team > Import and upload a CSV with columns: name, email, role, team.
generated_answer: On Pro/Enterprise: Go to Team > Import, upload CSV with name, email, role, team columns.

query: Can I set up automatic reminders for employees to submit timesheets?
contexts: Reminders can be configured in Settings > Notifications. Set up daily or weekly reminders for timesheet submission.
generated_answer: Yes! Configure in Settings > Notifications. Set daily or weekly timesheet reminders.

query: How do I view who edited a timesheet entry?
contexts: Timesheet audit logs show edit history. Go to Reports > Audit Log to see who made changes and when.
generated_answer: Check Reports > Audit Log for edit history showing who changed what and when.

query: Is there a way to prevent employees from editing past timesheets?
contexts: Timesheet locking is available on Pro and Enterprise. Configure lock periods in Settings > Timesheet Rules.
generated_answer: On Pro/Enterprise: Configure lock periods in Settings > Timesheet Rules.

query: How do I set up weekend overtime rates?
contexts: Overtime rates can be customized in Settings > Overtime Rules. Set different multipliers for weekdays, weekends, and holidays.
generated_answer: Customize in Settings > Overtime Rules. Set multipliers for weekdays, weekends, and holidays.

query: Can I export data for payroll processing?
contexts: Payroll exports are available in Reports > Payroll Export. Supports CSV, Excel, and direct integration with popular payroll providers.
generated_answer: Use Reports > Payroll Export. Supports CSV, Excel, and direct payroll provider integrations.

query: How do I change the timezone for my team?
contexts: Timezone is set at the organization level in Settings > Organization. All times are displayed in this timezone.
generated_answer: Set in Settings > Organization. This timezone applies to all team members.

query: What integrations do you support?
contexts: We integrate with Slack, Microsoft Teams, Google Calendar, and various payroll providers. API access is available on Pro and Enterprise plans.
generated_answer: Slack, Microsoft Teams, Google Calendar, payroll providers. API on Pro/Enterprise.

query: How do I add a custom leave type?
contexts: Custom leave types can be created in Settings > Leave Policies. Define accrual rules, approval requirements, and visibility.
generated_answer: Create in Settings > Leave Policies. Define accrual, approvals, and visibility.

query: Can managers see their team's timesheets but not others?
contexts: Role-based access controls allow managers to see their team's data. Configure in Settings > Permissions.
generated_answer: Yes, with role-based access. Configure team visibility in Settings > Permissions.

query: How do I handle a case where an employee forgot to clock out?
contexts: Admins can edit timesheet entries. Go to the employee's timesheet, find the entry, and click Edit to adjust times.
generated_answer: Admins can edit timesheets. Find the entry and click Edit to adjust.

query: Is there a way to track project hours separately from regular hours?
contexts: Project tracking is available on Pro and Enterprise. Enable in Settings > Features and configure project codes.
generated_answer: On Pro/Enterprise: Enable in Settings > Features and set up project codes.

query: How do I set up a holiday calendar?
contexts: Holiday calendars can be configured in Settings > Holidays. Add company holidays and assign to teams or organization-wide.
generated_answer: Configure in Settings > Holidays. Add holidays for teams or organization-wide.

query: Can I restrict which employees can work remotely?
contexts: Location restrictions can be set up with IP restrictions on Pro/Enterprise plans. Alternatively, use manager approval workflows.
generated_answer: Use IP restrictions (Pro/Enterprise) or manager approval workflows for location control.

query: How do I see who's currently clocked in?
contexts: Current status is shown on the Dashboard. Go to Dashboard > Live Status to see real-time attendance.
generated_answer: Check Dashboard > Live Status for real-time attendance.

query: What reports are available for compliance auditing?
contexts: Compliance reports include audit logs, edit history, and data exports. Available in Reports > Compliance.
generated_answer: Audit logs, edit history, exports in Reports > Compliance.

query: How do I disable an employee's access?
contexts: Deactivate employees from Team > Members. Click on the employee and select Deactivate. Their data is preserved but they can't log in.
generated_answer: Go to Team > Members, select employee, click Deactivate. Data preserved, access revoked.

query: Can I set different approval rules for different leave types?
contexts: Yes, approval rules are configured per leave type in Settings > Leave Policies. Set different approvers for vacation vs sick leave.
generated_answer: Yes! Configure per leave type in Settings > Leave Policies. Different approvers for different types.

query: How do I migrate from another time tracking system?
contexts: We offer migration assistance for Enterprise plans. Contact support to schedule a migration session with our team.
generated_answer: Enterprise plans include migration assistance. Contact support to schedule.

query: Is my data secure? What security measures do you have?
contexts: We use industry-standard encryption, SOC 2 compliance, regular security audits, and GDPR compliance. Data is encrypted at rest and in transit.
generated_answer: SOC 2, GDPR compliant, encryption at rest and in transit, regular audits.

query: How do I get support if I have an issue?
contexts: Support is available via chat, email, and phone depending on your plan. Basic plans have email support, Pro has chat, Enterprise has phone.
generated_answer: Email (Basic), Chat (Pro), Phone (Enterprise). Access via Help menu.

query: Can I customize the leave request form?
contexts: Form customization is available on Enterprise plans. Contact support to discuss your specific requirements.
generated_answer: Enterprise feature. Contact support to discuss customizations.

query: How do I delete my account and all data?
contexts: Account deactivation stops billing. For complete data deletion, contact support to request GDPR deletion.
generated_answer: Deactivate stops billing. For complete deletion, contact support for GDPR request.

query: Do you offer discounts for non-profits?
contexts: Yes, we offer 50% discounts for registered non-profits. Contact sales with your 501(c)(3) documentation.
generated_answer: 50% discount for registered non-profits. Contact sales with 501(c)(3) docs.

query: How do I add a note to a timesheet entry?
contexts: Notes can be added when editing a timesheet entry. Click Edit on the entry and add notes in the Notes field.
generated_answer: Click Edit on the entry and add notes in the Notes field.

query: Can employees see their leave balance?
contexts: Yes, employees can view their balance in their dashboard under Leave > My Balance.
generated_answer: Yes! Employees see balance in Dashboard > Leave > My Balance.

query: How do I set up a probationary period for new employees?
contexts: Probation settings can be configured per employee in their profile. Set start date and probation end date.
generated_answer: Configure in employee profile. Set start date and probation end date.

query: What's the difference between active and inactive employees?
contexts: Active employees can log in and use the system. Inactive employees retain data but can't access. Billing only applies to active employees.
generated_answer: Active = can access, billed. Inactive = data retained, no access, not billed.

query: Can I set up alerts when someone works overtime?
contexts: Overtime alerts can be configured in Settings > Notifications. Set thresholds and select who receives alerts.
generated_answer: Configure in Settings > Notifications. Set thresholds and recipients.

query: How do I handle shift swaps between employees?
contexts: Shift management is available on Pro and Enterprise. Employees can request swaps and managers approve them.
generated_answer: Pro/Enterprise: Employees request swaps, managers approve in Shifts section.

query: Is there an API documentation?
contexts: API documentation is available at docs.attendancebot.com/api. API access requires Pro or Enterprise plan.
generated_answer: docs.attendancebot.com/api. Requires Pro/Enterprise.

query: How do I change my email address?
contexts: Email can be updated in Profile Settings. You'll need to verify the new email address.
generated_answer: Update in Profile Settings. Verify the new email.

query: Can I export data for a specific date range?
contexts: All exports allow date range selection. Use the date picker when generating reports or exports.
generated_answer: Yes! Use the date picker on any export or report.

query: What happens if an employee doesn't submit their timesheet by the deadline?
contexts: Late submissions can be configured to require manager approval or be auto-approved. Set rules in Settings > Timesheet Rules.
generated_answer: Configure in Settings > Timesheet Rules: require approval or auto-approve late submissions.

query: How do I add a company logo to reports?
contexts: Report branding is available on Pro and Enterprise. Upload logo in Settings > Branding.
generated_answer: Pro/Enterprise: Upload in Settings > Branding.

query: Can I set up multiple locations/offices?
contexts: Multi-location support is available on Enterprise. Configure locations in Settings > Organization > Locations.
generated_answer: Enterprise: Configure in Settings > Organization > Locations.

query: How do I see a summary of all pending approvals?
contexts: Pending approvals are shown on the Dashboard and in Approvals > Pending. Filter by type or employee.
generated_answer: Check Dashboard or Approvals > Pending. Filter by type or employee.

query: Is there a mobile app for managers?
contexts: The same mobile app works for all users. Managers have additional options based on their permissions.
generated_answer: Same app for all. Managers see extra options based on permissions.

query: How do I change the default currency?
contexts: Currency is set at the organization level in Settings > Organization. This affects billing display only.
generated_answer: Set in Settings > Organization. Affects billing display only.

query: Can employees submit timesheets for past weeks?
contexts: Backdated submissions depend on your timesheet rules. Configure lock periods and approval requirements in Settings.
generated_answer: Depends on timesheet rules. Configure lock periods in Settings > Timesheet Rules.

query: How do I add a webhook for integrations?
contexts: Webhooks can be configured in Settings > Integrations > Webhooks. Requires Pro or Enterprise plan.
generated_answer: Pro/Enterprise: Configure in Settings > Integrations > Webhooks.

query: What's the maximum number of employees I can have?
contexts: No hard limit on employees. Pricing scales with team size. Contact sales for very large organizations (1000+ employees).
generated_answer: No hard limit. Scales with pricing. Contact sales for 1000+ employees.

query: How do I contact the support team?
contexts: Support contact options vary by plan. Basic: email. Pro: chat and email. Enterprise: dedicated phone line.
generated_answer: Basic: email. Pro: chat + email. Enterprise: phone. Access via Help menu.

query: Can I schedule reports to be emailed automatically?
contexts: Scheduled reports are available on Pro and Enterprise. Configure in Reports > Scheduled Reports.
generated_answer: Pro/Enterprise: Configure in Reports > Scheduled Reports.

query: How do I handle public holidays in different countries?
contexts: Multiple holiday calendars can be created for different countries or regions. Assign employees to appropriate calendars.
generated_answer: Create multiple holiday calendars for different regions. Assign employees accordingly.

query: Is training provided for new admins?
contexts: We offer documentation, video tutorials, and onboarding sessions for Enterprise customers.
generated_answer: Documentation, videos available. Enterprise gets onboarding sessions.

query: Can I import historical timesheet data?
contexts: Historical data import is available on Enterprise. Contact support to discuss data migration options.
generated_answer: Enterprise: Contact support for historical data migration options.

query: How do I reset a forgotten password?
contexts: Use the Forgot Password link on the login page. A reset link will be sent to your email.
generated_answer: Click Forgot Password on login page. Check email for reset link.

query: What browsers are supported?
contexts: We support Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge (latest 2 versions). Mobile browsers on iOS Safari and Chrome Android.
generated_answer: Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge (latest 2 versions). Mobile: iOS Safari, Chrome Android.

query: How do I enable two-factor authentication?
contexts: 2FA can be enabled in Profile Settings > Security. Supports authenticator apps and SMS.
generated_answer: Enable in Profile Settings > Security. Supports authenticator apps and SMS.

query: Can I create custom reports?
contexts: Custom reporting is available on Enterprise. Use the Report Builder in Reports > Custom.
generated_answer: Enterprise: Use Report Builder in Reports > Custom.

query: How do I update my credit card information?
contexts: Payment methods can be updated in Settings > Billing > Payment Methods.
generated_answer: Update in Settings > Billing > Payment Methods.

query: What is your uptime guarantee?
contexts: We offer 99.9% uptime SLA for Enterprise customers. Status page available at status.attendancebot.com
generated_answer: 99.9% uptime SLA for Enterprise. Status: status.attendancebot.com
